title: Create a complete inert Bee config sample
action: Create root-level config-sample.json as strict, copyable JSON covering every current Bee config surface per D1-D3, whose authoritative source is the approved plan.md scoping synthesis. Resolve source drift in this order: templates/lib/state.mjs for supported runtime shape, onboard_bee.mjs for initialized defaults, then docs/config-reference.md for operator examples. Include all hook and command keys, safe gate/advisor defaults, both runtime model maps with extraction/generation/review slots and the supported string, null, model-plus-effort, and CLI-executor value shapes, every advisor point, guards, extension namespaces, and a relative dogfood repository example. Do not edit .bee/config.json or introduce new semantics per D4.

truths: The file is strict JSON with exactly the nine supported top-level surfaces
All six hooks are enabled and idle_gate is true while gate_bypass and advisor are disabled
Both runtime maps contain extraction, generation, and review but never ceiling
The model examples collectively demonstrate string, null, model-plus-effort, and CLI-executor forms
The dogfood repository uses a labeled relative path and the active .bee/config.json is unchanged

artifacts.substantive: copyable strict-JSON sample covering every current Bee config surface without comments or stubs

key_links: Nested keys match skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/state.mjs current normalization and guard/hook readers
prohibitions: Do not add a ceiling model slot
Do not use absolute paths, secrets, comments, or trailing commas

verify: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('config-sample.json','utf8'));const eq=(a,b)=>JSON.stringify([...a].sort())===JSON.stringify([...b].sort()),text=v=>typeof v==='string'&&Boolean(v.trim());const top=['hooks','guards','lanes','capabilities','commands','gate_bypass','models','advisor','dogfood_repos'];if(!eq(Object.keys(c),top))throw Error('top-level keys');const hooks=['session-init','prompt-context','write-guard','state-sync','chain-nudge','session-close'];if(!eq(Object.keys(c.hooks),hooks)||!hooks.every(k=>c.hooks[k]===true))throw Error('hooks');if(!eq(Object.keys(c.guards),['idle_gate'])||c.guards.idle_gate!==true)throw Error('guards');if(Object.keys(c.lanes).length||Object.keys(c.capabilities).length)throw Error('extension namespaces');const commands=['setup','start','test','verify'];if(!eq(Object.keys(c.commands),commands)||!commands.every(k=>text(c.commands[k])))throw Error('commands');if(c.gate_bypass!==false||!eq(Object.keys(c.models),['claude','codex']))throw Error('models');for(const r of ['claude','codex'])if(!eq(Object.keys(c.models[r]),['extraction','generation','review'])||'ceiling' in c.models[r])throw Error(r+' model slots');if(!text(c.models.claude.extraction)||!text(c.models.claude.generation?.model)||!['low','medium','high','xhigh','max'].includes(c.models.claude.generation?.effort)||!text(c.models.claude.review))throw Error('claude model forms');if(c.models.codex.extraction!==null||c.models.codex.generation!==null||c.models.codex.review?.kind!=='cli'||!text(c.models.codex.review?.command))throw Error('codex model forms');if(c.advisor.enabled!==false||!text(c.advisor.model)||!eq(c.advisor.at,['context','shape','execution','review','blocked']))throw Error('advisor');const d=c.dogfood_repos;if(!Array.isArray(d)||d.length!==1||!text(d[0].label)||path.isAbsolute(d[0].path)||!d[0].path.startsWith('..'))throw Error('dogfood');" && git diff --exit-code -- .bee/config.json

trace.outcome: Added a complete inert strict-JSON Bee configuration sample covering all supported surfaces and model-slot forms without changing active config.
trace.verify_output: PASS: exit 0; structure assertions passed; .bee/config.json unchanged; command produced no stdout
